meta.description: Site prep, grading, foundation excavation, trenching, and land clearing for builders and developers across Central Oregon.

home.title: Wright Excavation | Central Oregon Excavation Contractor

blocks.heading: Excavation That Keeps Your Schedule Intact
blocks.subheading: Wright Excavation works directly with builders and developers across Central Oregon. Focused crews, realistic timelines, no surprises.

blocks.heading: The Wrong Excavation Crew Can Derail Your Entire Build
blocks.body: One unreliable excavator pushes every trade behind you. Missed deadlines. Surprise costs. Your reputation takes the hit.

blocks.heading: A Different Kind of Excavation Company
blocks.body: Most excavators juggle four jobs at once and hope for the best. We run a small, focused crew by design. One project at a time gets our full attention.
blocks.quote: We know what it costs you when excavation runs late. So we don't.

steps.title: Submit Your Project Details
steps.body: Tell us what you need and when. We respond within one business day.

steps.title: Receive a Clear Bid & Scope
steps.body: Flat-rate, itemized bid. No vague estimates. Delivered within 3–5 business days.

steps.title: Scheduled & Executed Efficiently
steps.body: One crew, one job. Your site gets prepped on time so your build stays on track.

blocks.heading: Every Type of Excavation Work. Done In-House.
blocks.subheading: We don't broker work out. Our crew handles every job from start to finish.

services.title: Site Preparation
services.body: Clearing, leveling, and prepping your lot. Your project starts clean and on schedule.

services.title: Grading & Leveling
services.body: Precise grading for proper drainage and a stable foundation. No rework needed.

services.title: Foundation Excavation
services.body: Clean, accurate foundation digging. The right start for a smooth build.

blocks.heading: Proudly Serving Central Oregon
blocks.body: Based in Bend, we run crews across Deschutes, Jefferson, and Crook counties. If you're within 60 miles of Bend, we can get to you.

blocks.heading: Common Questions
blocks.subheading: Everything you need to know before you reach out.

items.q: How fast can you get out for an estimate?
items.a: We respond within one business day and can typically do a site visit within 3–5 business days.

items.q: Do you work with general contractors or just homeowners?
items.a: Both. About 60% of our work is for GCs and commercial developers. The other 40% is residential homeowners.

items.q: Are you licensed and insured in Oregon?
items.a: Yes. We're Oregon CCB licensed and carry full general liability and workers' comp insurance.

items.q: What's included in a typical bid?
items.a: Our bids are itemized and flat-rate. Equipment, labor, mobilization, and disposal. No surprise line items.

blocks.heading: Ready to Keep Your Build on Schedule?
blocks.subheading: Submit your project details and get a flat-rate bid within 3–5 business days. No vague estimates. No surprises.
